title: Oars and Moria’s Nightmare: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It sounds like oz is screaming.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Wow!! Look, a bunch of meat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Come on, get those shadows, strawhat!

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: Why do we have to wait?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We just need to beat this guy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Are you seriously trying to win!!?

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: That's right, zoro!! just kill time!!
